entities.description: As a subsection of '引脚定义', this section provides the pin definition for the CONOA connector, which is part of the hardware specification for the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board.
Refers to a specific connector type used on the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board, detailed in section 2.2.1.

relations.description: The concept of 'CONOA' is the primary topic of section 2.2.1.
